hub_subtitle: Conversação para Viagens, Encontros Reais e Cultura

lesson.menu_title: Who Is Marcelo? -- Diagnostic & Real-Life English
lesson.menu_desc: Reactivating forty years of English through travel, conversation and identity -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic Session
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marcelo de Azevedo Souza | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic

listenings.text: Hi Marcelo, it's Elin. We met on the trail near the fjord last week. I really enjoyed our talk. It's rare to strike up a conversation with someone so worldly and so down to earth. I've been telling my friends about the Brazilian cyclist who has ridden through Albania and Morocco. Listen, a few of us are planning a three-day ride along the coast in November, right when you're back in Norway. The route is beautiful and completely off the beaten path. I think you'd be blown away. Reach out if you're interested. I would love for you to join us. Take care, and safe travels.

Good evening, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome aboard this flight to Reykjavik. We will begin boarding in just a few minutes, starting with passengers traveling with small children and those who need extra time. Tonight's flight time is a little over eight hours, and we expect a smooth journey with clear skies over the Atlantic. The weather in Reykjavik is cool, around four degrees, so please keep a warm jacket in your hand luggage. We know many of you are heading north for the adventure of a lifetime. Sit back, relax, and enjoy the flight. We are delighted to have you with us.
